title: alyssum montanum proles thessalum
intro: Alyssum montanum proles thessalum, also known as Thessaly alyssum, is a subspecies of the mountain alyssum plant (Alyssum montanum) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thessaly alyssum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant, making it a natural remedy for coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Alyssum montanum proles thessalum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
